questions.explanation: x-offset, y-offset, blur, spread, color (color and spread are optional).

questions.prompt: Is this shadow inside or outside the box?
questions.explanation: The `inset` keyword paints the shadow inside the element.

questions.prompt: For realistic depth, LAYER multiple shadows because:
options: A single shadow reads flat; multi-layer mimics ambient + directional light
questions.explanation: Real design systems (Tailwind, Material) use stacked shadows.

questions.prompt: Which is cheapest (no repaint on scroll):
options: box-shadow on a fixed positioned bar
Neither is cheap; prefer solid backgrounds if perf matters
questions.explanation: Large blurred shadows are pricey to paint. Optimize hot paths.

questions.prompt: filter: drop-shadow vs box-shadow — key difference:
options: drop-shadow follows the alpha shape of the element (non-rectangular)
questions.explanation: Great for irregular shapes like SVG icons or clipped elements.
